_meta.description: Idle Iktah XP thresholds shared across IktahMetrics users. _default[level] = total accumulated XP needed to reach that level (applies to every skill). thresholds[skill][level] overrides _default when a specific skill diverges. Used to compute within-level progress and ETA.
_meta.contribute: IktahMetrics menu → 'Copy Observed Thresholds' copies your local-only observations to the clipboard. Paste them into a PR / issue on https://github.com/Linesmerrill/IktahMetrics to add them here.
